task:
In Brave, fill out the pizza order form at https://httpbin.org/forms/post with these exact values and submit it:
- Customer name: `John Smith`
- Telephone: `555-1234`
- E-mail address: `john@example.com`
- Pizza Size: `Medium`
- Delivery instructions: `Extra cheese please`

Submission redirects to https://httpbin.org/post, which echoes the submitted values. Bookmark the resulting https://httpbin.org/post response page.

verification.description: Response page contains submitted customer name 'John Smith'
Bookmark for httpbin.org/post response page exists
